ocr.text: The analysis presents two tables detailing diagnostic parameters and gene ontology (GO) terms. In Table 1, the parameters
include Sensitivity at 84.0% with a 95% confidence interval (CI) of 79.5–88.5, Specificity at 61.0% with a 95% CI of 55.0–
67.1, Positive Predictive Value at 35.0% with a 95% CI of 29.1–40.9, Negative Predictive Value at 93.8% with a 95% CI of
91.1–96.9, and Accuracy at 65.6% with a 95% CI of 60.1–71.9. Table 2 lists various GO terms alongside their respective P-
values, genes, and involved miRNAs.
Parameter  Percent (%)  95% CI
Sensitivity  84.0  79.5–88.5
Specificity  61.0  55.0–67.1
Positive predictive Value  35.0  29.1–40.9
Negative Predictive Value  93.8  91.1–96.9
GO Term  P-Value  Genes  Involved miRNAs
actin cytoskeleton organization  0.023554309  RND3, CALD1, LIMCH1, MYH11  miR-802, miR-1322
actin filament-based process  0.027802287  RND3, CALD1, LIMCH1, MYH11  miR-802, miR-1322
positive regulation of apoptosis  0.029075368  SERINC3, CDKN2A, ALDH1A3, IGFBP3, CASP2  miR-802, miR-4319, miR-933, miR-1322, miR-3176, miR-1469
positive regulation of programmed cell death  0.029725847  SERINC3, CDKN2A, ALDH1A3, IGFBP3, CASP2  miR-802, miR-4319, miR-933, miR-1322, miR-3176, miR-1469
positive regulation of cell death  0.030164333  SERINC3, CDKN2A, ALDH1A3, IGFBP3, CASP2  miR-802, miR-4319, miR-933, miR-1322, miR-3176, miR-1469
The term actin cytoskeleton organization has a P-value of 0.023554309, associated with genes RND3, CALD1, LIMCH1,
MYH11, and miRNAs miR-802, miR-1322. Similarly, actin filament-based process has a P-value of 0.027802287 with the
same genes and miRNAs. The positive regulation of apoptosis is represented by a P-value of 0.029075368, involving genes
SERINC3, CDKN2A, ALDH1A3, IGFBP3, CASP2, and miRNAs miR-802, miR-4319, miR-933, miR-1322, miR-3176, miR-
1469. The positive regulation of programmed cell death shows a P-value of 0.029725847 with identical gene and miRNA
involvement, while the positive regulation of cell death has a P-value of 0.030164333, maintaining the same list of genes and
miRNAs.
